Adams.source: All three markers were reported by the checkmutations image-based prediction tool applied to Mrs. Adams' histopathology images, as documented in the Tool Results section for patient A.

Brown.source: The checkmutations tool reported all three markers from histopathology images of Mrs. Brown, as detailed in the Tool Results section for patient B.

Doe.source: All three markers were reported by the 'checkmutations' tool from histopathology images for Mr. Doe (patient D), as explicitly cited with [Tool] tags in the model response and confirmed in the Tool Results section.

Garcia.source: The checkmutations tool was not run for Mr. Garcia; the agent only used segmentation and calculation tools, and explicitly requested histologic images at the end to perform genetic modeling in the future.

Lee.source: The checkmutations image-based prediction tool was never run for Mr. Lee; his KRAS G12C status came from molecular analysis of the tumor (patient record), and the tool results section shows only a radiology report comparison and a Google search.

Lopez.source: The checkmutations tool was run with patient ID 'AA-21-C' on histopathology images, as reported in the Tool Results section for Lopez.

Smith.source: The checkmutations tool analyzed histopathology images of patient B13-22A (Mrs. Smith) and reported MSS with probability 0.96, KRAS mutated with probability 0.52, and BRAF wild-type with probability 0.03, as documented in the Tool Results section for patient S.

Taylor.source: The checkmutations tool was not run for Mr. Taylor; only a radiology report tool was used, and the model explicitly requested histopathology images to perform genetic modeling in a future step.

Williams.source: All three markers were reported by the checkmutations image-based prediction tool in the W (Williams) Tool Results section of the supplementary.

Xing.source: All three markers were reported by the 'checkmutations' tool applied to histopathology images for patient ID X-09.22, as documented in the Tool Results section for patient X (Ms. Xing).

Zu.source: The checkmutations tool encountered an error when run for Mr. Zu and did not return any predictions for MSI, KRAS, or BRAF.

Adomako.source: The checkmutations tool applied to histopathology images reported MSS (prob 0.97), KRAS mutated (prob 0.68), and BRAF wild-type (prob 0.05) in the Tool Results section for patient Adomako.

Anderson.source: The checkmutations tool reported all three markers from Mrs. Anderson's histopathology images, as documented in the 'An' Tool Results section of the supplementary.

Chen.source: The checkmutations tool analyzed Mrs. Chen's histopathology images using patient ID 'XX-03AY' and reported MSS (0.97), BRAF wild-type (0.03), and KRAS wild-type (0.27) in the 'Ch' Tool Results section.

Davis.source: All three markers were reported by the checkmutations tool applied to Mr. Davis's histopathology images, as documented in the 'Da' Tool Results section.

Johnson.source: The checkmutations tool was never run for Mrs. Johnson; only a radiology report tool was used (and it encountered a folder error), with no genetic marker predictions reported.

Martinez.source: The checkmutations image-based prediction tool was not run for Mr. Martinez; his KRAS G12D status came from his clinical history, and only segmentation and OncoKB tools were used in his case.

Miller.source: The checkmutations tool was not run for Mr. Miller; only MRI segmentation and a treatment options search were used, and the model explicitly requested histopathology images to perform genetic analysis in the future.

Patel.source: The checkmutations tool encountered an error when run for Mrs. Patel and returned no predictions for MSI, KRAS, or BRAF.

Zhang.source: The 'checkmutations' image-based prediction tool was run on Mrs. Zhang's histopathology images using her system ID 'AA-02-xx2', as reported in the Tool Results section for patient 'Zh'.
